# Paulo Tuya

> Bilingual portfolio site for Paulo Tuya covering project delivery, partnerships, operations, selected work, experience, and contact information.

This site publishes the same core portfolio content in English and Spanish.

The unprefixed root URLs are bridge pages for locale routing. The canonical public pages live under `/en/` and `/es/`.

## Canonical Pages

- [Home (English)](https://paw-paw.github.io/en/): Main portfolio overview with positioning, selected work, experience highlights, skills, and contact path.
- [Inicio (Español)](https://paw-paw.github.io/es/): Versión principal del portfolio con resumen, trabajo destacado, experiencia, habilidades y contacto.
- [Work (English)](https://paw-paw.github.io/en/work/): Selected projects, delivery scope, metrics, and partner-facing execution examples.
- [Trabajo (Español)](https://paw-paw.github.io/es/work/): Proyectos seleccionados, alcance de delivery, métricas y ejemplos de ejecución con partners.
- [Experience (English)](https://paw-paw.github.io/en/experience/): Professional timeline across operations, partnerships, and delivery roles.
- [Experiencia (Español)](https://paw-paw.github.io/es/experience/): Recorrido profesional en operaciones, alianzas y roles de delivery.
- [Contact (English)](https://paw-paw.github.io/en/contact/): Direct contact page for project delivery, partnerships, and operations opportunities.
- [Contacto (Español)](https://paw-paw.github.io/es/contact/): Página directa de contacto para oportunidades de delivery, alianzas y operaciones.
